name_cn:
Dior❤ Medium Travel Nomad Clutch
This season's new clutch bag fuses multiple elements, making it a stylish statement piece. Crafted from black calfskin! It features a distinctive oversized woven quilted effect. The spacious, flexible design can hold a mobile phone and various small daily items. It is easy to carry by hand or on the shoulder, with metal rings on the sides, allowing it to be paired with a Dior embroidered shoulder strap.
Fits various iPhone models and wallets
Size: 22×13×9.5cm
Model: S5554
